user_message: The CSA escalated VanArsdel Ltd to me -- can you investigate the decline?

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 10:22 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: VanArsdel Ltd escalation triage

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 17:38 EST
Subject: escalation triage - Action Required

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 09:36 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: VanArsdel Ltd escalation triage

Our team encountered some challenges with escalation triage. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF16-F trap (Ignores the trigger urgency in the original email); produces complete Thread summary, key commitments/asks identified, waiting-on-whom assessment, draft response matching
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF16-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF16-F failure mode (Ignores the trigger urgency in the original email)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF16-F -- Ignores the trigger urgency in the original email
